name: Solaris Resources Inc.
description: Solaris Resources Inc. is a copper development company advancing the Warintza Project in southeastern Ecuador, one of the world's most significant copper discoveries with 1.3 billion tonnes of mineral reserves, a US$4.6 billion NPV, and first-quartile costs. The company is dual-listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and NYSE, and effective January 2025 transitioned to new leadership focused on bringing Warintza into production. Solaris is a developer stage company working toward a construction decision on Warintza.
